mapper.insert: insert into study_user_collect ( user_id, type, target_id, create_time ) values ( #{userId}, #{type}, #{targetId}, #{createTime} )
mapper.delete: delete from study_user_collect where user_id = #{userId} and type = #{type} and target_id = #{targetId}
mapper.select: select count(1) from study_user_collect where user_id = #{userId} and type = #{type} and target_id = #{targetId}

SELECT c.collect_id as id, c.user_id as userId, c.target_id as targetId, c.type, CASE WHEN c.type = '1' THEN l.title WHEN c.type = '2' THEN a.title ELSE '' END as title, c.create_time as createTime, CASE WHEN c.type = '2' THEN SUBSTRING(a.content, 1, 150) ELSE '' END as contentSummary, CASE WHEN c.type = '1' THEN SUBSTRING(l.description, 1, 150) ELSE '' END as descriptionSummary FROM study_user_collect c LEFT JOIN study_lesson l ON c.type = '1' AND c.target_id = l.lesson_id LEFT JOIN study_article a ON c.type = '2' AND c.target_id = a.article_id WHERE c.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY c.create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
